summary: Iteration 3 testing complete. All new features working correctly: Coach availability calendar (DB-backed), Past sessions display, Session progress scoped to active request (Bug #1 fixed), Coach can edit total sessions, Session booking checks availability. Full E2E flow tested successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly and working as expected
Coach availability CRUD endpoints properly secured (coach-only access)
Session progress correctly scoped to active request - Bug #1 fixed
Past sessions from seed data displaying correctly (6 sessions with Gaurav)
Edit total sessions feature working with proper validation
Schedule modal fetches real availability from DB via coachId prop
seed_data_creation: Past journey with 6 sessions seeded for Sarah with Gaurav. Coach availability seeded for March-April 2026 weekdays.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full E2E flow tested: Sarah (no active request) -> selects 3 coaches -> fills goals -> sends request -> Fatema accepts -> Fatema edits total sessions to 8 -> Sarah schedules session using calendar-based slot picker (real availability from DB) -> session appears (1/8) -> complete journey -> submit feedback -> can find new coach. Past Sessions section shows 8 sessions (6 from seed + 2 from E2E tests). Stats correctly show 0/6 when no active journey.

features_verified.bug_1_session_progress_reset_fixed: VERIFIED - Stats show 0/6 when no active journey, correctly scoped to active request
features_verified.default_6_total_sessions: VERIFIED - New requests default to 6 sessions
features_verified.coach_can_edit_total_sessions: VERIFIED - Edit button on active coachees, dialog with input, save updates total
features_verified.past_sessions_seeded: VERIFIED - 6 past sessions for Sarah with Gaurav from Nov-Dec 2025
features_verified.coach_availability_calendar: VERIFIED - Month navigation, date clicking, time slot toggles, save button
features_verified.coachee_sees_real_availability: VERIFIED - Schedule modal fetches real availability via coachId prop
features_verified.session_booking_checks_availability: VERIFIED - Booking marks slot as booked, unavailable slots not shown
